Figure 4: Summary Ouput of Model 1

## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = price ~ enginevolume + horsepower + wheelbase + 
##     drivetrain, data = cars)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -8729.4 -1942.6  -310.9  1697.3 15493.4 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                 Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   -37613.836   5542.907  -6.786 1.29e-10 ***
## enginevolume    -339.181    940.238  -0.361    0.719    
## horsepower       127.436      8.674  14.691  < 2e-16 ***
## wheelbase        387.665     54.381   7.129 1.83e-11 ***
## drivetrainFWD   -378.524   1421.669  -0.266    0.790    
## drivetrainRWD   1790.065   1477.164   1.212    0.227    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 3955 on 199 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.761,  Adjusted R-squared:  0.755 
## F-statistic: 126.7 on 5 and 199 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

Figure 6-1: Boxplot for Model 1

Figure 6-2: Boxplot for Model 1 with Log Transformation

Figure 7: Summary Ouput of Model 2

## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = log(price) ~ enginevolume + log(horsepower) + wheelbase + 
##     drivetrain, data = cars)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.56603 -0.13590 -0.02267  0.14792  0.63415 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                  Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)      2.838054   0.357327   7.942 1.43e-13 ***
## enginevolume    -0.007779   0.051294  -0.152    0.880    
## log(horsepower)  0.908403   0.055975  16.229  < 2e-16 ***
## wheelbase        0.024265   0.002973   8.162 3.70e-14 ***
## drivetrainFWD   -0.088251   0.077352  -1.141    0.255    
## drivetrainRWD    0.091137   0.080114   1.138    0.257    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2148 on 199 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.8227, Adjusted R-squared:  0.8182 
## F-statistic: 184.6 on 5 and 199 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

Figure 8: Interaction Term

## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = log(price) ~ log(horsepower) * drivetrain, data = cars)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.65851 -0.15945 -0.02411  0.16558  0.64570 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                    5.15119    1.24395   4.141 5.11e-05 ***
## log(horsepower)                0.91145    0.27516   3.312   0.0011 ** 
## drivetrainFWD                 -0.24520    1.30177  -0.188   0.8508    
## drivetrainRWD                 -0.39080    1.33222  -0.293   0.7696    
## log(horsepower):drivetrainFWD  0.03274    0.28849   0.113   0.9098    
## log(horsepower):drivetrainRWD  0.12775    0.29212   0.437   0.6624    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2487 on 199 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.7623, Adjusted R-squared:  0.7563 
## F-statistic: 127.6 on 5 and 199 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

Figure 9: Interaction Term with Entire Model

## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = log(price) ~ enginevolume + log(horsepower) * drivetrain + 
##     wheelbase, data = cars)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.54640 -0.13073 -0.02757  0.14706  0.61277 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                 Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                    3.2028919  1.0859026   2.950 0.003568 ** 
## enginevolume                   0.0005134  0.0508383   0.010 0.991953    
## log(horsepower)                0.7927511  0.2359863   3.359 0.000938 ***
## drivetrainFWD                 -0.0576934  1.1130026  -0.052 0.958712    
## drivetrainRWD                 -1.2248397  1.1439289  -1.071 0.285601    
## wheelbase                      0.0256371  0.0029887   8.578 2.85e-15 ***
## log(horsepower):drivetrainFWD -0.0099450  0.2464989  -0.040 0.967859    
## log(horsepower):drivetrainRWD  0.2771066  0.2503878   1.107 0.269769    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2124 on 197 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.8284, Adjusted R-squared:  0.8223 
## F-statistic: 135.8 on 7 and 197 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

Figure 14: VIF of Final Model

##                     GVIF Df GVIF^(1/(2*Df))
## enginevolume    1.143944  1        1.069553
## log(horsepower) 1.647740  1        1.283643
## wheelbase       1.416847  1        1.190314
## drivetrain      1.978277  2        1.185965
